summary: During Meta's second-quarter earnings call, CEO Mark Zuckerberg expressed satisfaction with Facebook's progress among young adults, contradicting the prevailing public narrative, and highlighted the growth of Meta's user base to over 3.2 billion daily users across its apps.

summary: Future Fund managing partner Gary Black has commended Meta Platforms Inc. for its strong second-quarter performance and the leadership of CEO Mark Zuckerberg. This praise comes as the company's stock significantly surged after-hours trading.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Says Meta's $405B Model Llama 3.1 Has Better Cost Performance Than OpenAI's ChatGPT: This Is An 'Inflection Point In The Industry'
summary: During Meta's second-quarter earnings call, CEO Mark Zuckerberg highlighted the superior cost performance of their $405 billion Llama 3.1 model compared to leading closed models like OpenAI's ChatGPT, emphasizing his belief in open-source AI becoming the industry standard.
